news.title: Oil prices jump after Iran and U.S. attack commercial ships as tensions escalate over Strait of Hormuz

news.summary: Crude oil prices surged Sunday, as the U.S. and Iran teetered on the brink of a renewed war after attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
